decisions.decision: Create dev Neon branch manually in Neon console, point .env.local DATABASE_URL at it
decisions.rationale: Vercel-Neon integration only auto-provisions Production + per-PR Preview branches, no persistent Development branch. Manual branch isolates UAT from prod Neon without coupling to a PR.

decisions.decision: Accept Neon Auth beta limitation: one instance per project, not per branch
decisions.rationale: Tried to activate Neon Auth on dev branch — console rejected it. The test user lives in the shared project-wide Neon Auth user store. Test user persists across all branches and CI runs, making the seed step a one-time bootstrap rather than per-run.

decisions.decision: Hardcode localhost:3000 in seed-e2e-user.ts, drop seed step from ci.yml entirely
decisions.rationale: Script was using NEON_AUTH_URL as base which 404s (Neon hosted endpoint doesn't expose Next.js proxy paths). Additionally, CI seed step ran BEFORE Playwright started dev server via webServer config, meaning it would ECONNREFUSED even with the bug fixed. And the seed is unnecessary anyway because Neon Auth is project-wide — user persists across runs. Committed as 1f22b7d.

decisions.decision: truncate-push no-op on dev branch is correct, not a bug
decisions.rationale: This PR is the first time the app actually uses a Neon DB — prior phases had the push tables on prod via one-shot manual migration (scripts/push-migration.sql). The fresh dev branch has no push tables because rollout step D-10 (apply migration) hasn't been run on it. E2E suite doesn't exercise push subscription flows (Scenario 7 deferred), so missing tables don't block Scenario 9.

next_action: Run `pnpm test:e2e` locally. Watch for (1) global-setup success log '[e2e-global-setup] Authenticated state saved to ...' confirming auth proxy + shared Neon Auth + .env.local all wired correctly, (2) any spec failures — triage by pasting output. If green, mark Scenario 9 done and proceed to Scenario 10 (pnpm build + pnpm lint). If any scenario fails Phase 41 cannot close.
context_notes: Session focused on Scenario 9 prerequisites. Major discoveries: (1) Neon Auth is one-instance-per-project in beta, (2) Vercel-Neon integration doesn't provision persistent dev branch, (3) seed-e2e-user.ts had a real bug masked by CI env override that also happened to not work in CI. Fixed the script and removed the CI seed step in a single commit (1f22b7d). Tasks 1-4 of this session's todo list all done; Task 5 (pnpm test:e2e) is the next action and requires human execution. Only 2 human-verifiable scenarios remain before Phase 41 closes: Scenario 9 (e2e) and Scenario 10 (build+lint). Scenario 7 stays deferred.
